badge.title: APTIS ALIGNED
badge.text: This module specifically addresses the B2 performance descriptors for lexical range and accuracy in technology contexts.

tip.title: Academic Insight
tip.text: Focus on cause-and-effect language and future predictions when discussing technology trends.

sections.title: 1. Technology Vocabulary
sections.description: Click cards to flip and listen.

cards.definition: The integration of digital technology into all areas of a business or society, fundamentally changing how it operates.
A system or device designed to be easy to use, even for people with little technical knowledge.
cards.translation: Giao diện thân thiện với người dùng

cards.definition: The newest and most advanced technology available in a particular field.
The aspect of information technology that relates to the right of individuals to control how their personal information is collected and used.
Computer systems designed to perform tasks that normally require human intelligence, such as visual perception and decision-making.
The smooth incorporation of new technology or systems with existing ones without disruption.

tip.title: Pro-Tip
tip.text: Use "cutting-edge" instead of "new" to emphasize that the technology is the most advanced available.

sections.title: 2. Technology Synonyms (B2 Level)
sections.description: Elevate your vocabulary by replacing common A1/A2 words with professional B2-level alternatives.

practiceTasks.label: Practice Task
practiceTasks.text: Rewrite a paragraph about technology using at least three B2 equivalents from the table above.

practiceTasks.label: Speaking Drill
practiceTasks.text: Discuss how technology has transformed your daily life using at least five advanced vocabulary words from this section.

image.alt: Modern technology with digital interfaces and innovation concepts

tip.title: Pro-Tip: Precision Matters
tip.text: In technology contexts, using "disrupt" instead of "change" shows a sophisticated understanding of how new innovations can completely transform industries.

sections.title: 3. Technology Grammar: Future Forms
sections.description: Using future tenses effectively to discuss technological predictions and plans.

points.title: Will for Predictions
points.function: To make predictions about future technological developments
examples: Artificial intelligence will revolutionize healthcare within the next decade.
Smart homes will become standard in most households by 2030.

points.title: Be Going To for Plans
points.function: To talk about planned technological developments or personal intentions
examples: Our company is going to launch a new app next month.
I'm going to upgrade my computer next week.

points.title: Future Continuous for Ongoing Actions
points.function: To describe actions that will be in progress at a specific time in the future
examples: This time next year, I'll be using virtual reality for remote meetings.
By 2025, most people will be working with AI assistants.

rows: The government is going to invest in digital infrastructure.
We'll be using voice recognition software in most devices.

tip.title: Pro-Tip: Future Nuance
tip.text: Use "will" for general predictions about technology trends, and "be going to" for specific planned developments.

sections.title: Technology Vocabulary Practice
sections.description: Choose the best word or phrase to complete each technology sentence.

questions.prompt: "________ involves integrating digital technology into all areas of a business, fundamentally changing how it operates."
"A ________ is designed to be easy to use, even for people with little technical knowledge."
"________ refers to the newest and most advanced technology available in a particular field."
"________ relates to the right of individuals to control how their personal information is collected and used."
"________ involves computer systems designed to perform tasks that normally require human intelligence."
"________ describes the smooth incorporation of new technology with existing systems without disruption."
"________ technology will likely become more prevalent in healthcare diagnostics."
"Companies must ensure ________ to maintain customer trust in the digital age."
"The new smartphone features a ________ that makes it accessible to users of all ages."
"________ has enabled businesses to operate more efficiently and reach global markets."

sections.title: Technology Concepts Matching
sections.description: Drag each technology concept to the correct category.

sections.title: Reading Part 2: Technology Trends
sections.description: Complete the passage using the most appropriate technology vocabulary.

passage.title: The Future of Work in the Digital Age
parts: ________ has fundamentally changed how we work and communicate. Companies are investing in
________ to create more efficient processes. A user-friendly
________ is essential for employee adoption of new systems. However, as we integrate more
________ becomes increasingly important. The goal is
________ integration of technology that enhances productivity without compromising security.

questions.prompt: What is the main theme of the passage?
options: The importance of traditional office work
How technology is changing the workplace

questions.prompt: According to the passage, what is essential for employee adoption of new systems?

tip.title: Reading Tip
tip.text: Look for collocations such as "digital transformation" and "seamless integration" to help you choose the correct words.

sections.title: Writing Part 4: Technology Opinion
sections.description: Write a short formal response using the vocabulary from this lesson.

prompt.situation: Some people believe that technology improves our lives, while others think it creates more problems than it solves. What is your opinion? Write a short essay (80-140 words) expressing your view. Use appropriate future forms and at least 5 vocabulary words from this lesson.
prompt.referenceAnswer: In my opinion, technology will continue to bring more benefits than problems to our lives. Digital transformation has already revolutionized how we work, communicate, and access information. Cutting-edge technology such as artificial intelligence will solve complex problems in healthcare and education. However, we must ensure seamless integration of new systems while protecting data privacy. In the future, I believe we'll see even more user-friendly interfaces that make technology accessible to everyone. Although there are challenges, the potential for positive change is enormous if we approach technological development responsibly.

tip.title: B2 Writing Tip
tip.text: Use a variety of future forms (will for predictions, be going to for plans) to show sophisticated grammar control. Include linking words like "however" and "although" to present balanced arguments.
